findings.title: scanDocsRecursive produced doubled destination paths
findings.issue: to was computed as path.join(umbrellaDocsDir, relativePath) but umbrellaDocsDir already had the correct target path via recursion. relativePath added one more directory level, producing doubled paths like docs/internal/specs/specs/
findings.fix: Removed relativePath computation, used umbrellaDocsDir directly as to path. Added regression test checking for doubled paths.

findings.title: Method 3 in syncToGitHub overwrites previous methods unconditionally
findings.issue: resolveSyncTarget result was applied unconditionally. In centralized mode it returns global config which would clobber Method 2 (multiProject) values if both modes were active.
findings.fix: Added source !== 'global' guard so Method 3 only applies when resolver found a non-global match.
